# EntityContainerClosedAfterEvent Class

> [!CAUTION]
> This class is still in pre-release.  Its signature may change or it may be removed in future releases.

Contains information regarding a specific entity container being closed.

## Properties

### **closeSource**
`read-only closeSource: ContainerAccessSource;`

The source of the entity container being closed.

Type: [*ContainerAccessSource*](ContainerAccessSource.md)

### **entity**
`read-only entity: Entity;`

Type: [*Entity*](Entity.md)
